subject: [PATCH 1/4] arm64: request contpte-sized folios for exec memory

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's behavior for small text segments, suggesting that using 2M folios on all page sizes may be a better approach. Also suggested considering mapping vma size.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: This patch series adjusts the folio order for executable memory on arm64 to use contpte-sized folios, which are aligned to the number of contiguous PTEs that the hardware can coalesce into a single iTLB entry. The current implementation uses a fixed 64K folio size, but this is suboptimal for larger page sizes (16K and 64K). The patch series introduces a new formula to calculate the optimal folio order based on the number of contiguous PTEs.
